pkgmetadata.longdescription: dbt plugin for SQLFluffThis plugin works with [SQLFluff](httpspypi.orgprojectsqlfluff), theSQL linter for humans, to correctly parse and compile SQL projects using[dbt](httpspypi.orgprojectdbt).For more details on how to use this plugin,[see the documentation](httpsdocs.sqlfluff.comenstableconfiguration.htmldbt-project-configuration).
